project.name: Cortex
project.description: Personal AI infrastructure — agents, skills, and automation working together. Dashboard and memory store for a team of AI agents running via Cursor skills and hooks.
project.for: Matt — daily productivity, idea validation, and autonomous agent workflows

ideas.content: Build the MVP flywheel: idea capture → validation → memory → daily report
What if cortex auto-routes inbox items to the right agent without manual invocation?

brief.summary: Auto-routing inbox items would reduce manual agent invocation friction but needs a classifier and routing table.

decisions.decision: Use Cursor skills and hooks as the orchestration layer; cortex UI is the dashboard and memory store
decisions.rationale: Agents run in Cursor/Claude on demand. Cortex does not call LLM APIs directly. Git-tracked JSON at .memory/ is the shared state.

decisions.decision: Start with Idea Creator & Validator agent before Coding Agent
decisions.rationale: Proves capture → reason → persist → surface with minimal dependencies. Coding Agent slots in once ideas pass validation.

decisions.decision: Smart sidebar uses Recent + Frequent + More with EWMA scoring in localStorage
decisions.rationale: Client-side navUsage tracks clicks and capped dwell time per view. Layout uses Recent (last 3), Frequent (EWMA top slots), and collapsed More for overflow. Visual reorder on reload only; scores update live. No server analytics needed.

pain_points.description: index.html and app.js diverged — inline script was the live app
pain_points.resolution: Extracted inline JS to app.js; index.html loads app.js as single source of truth
